info.name: CareerCompass API
info.description: Complete API collection for CareerCompass - AI-powered career guidance platform with CV parsing, job scraping, and skill gap analysis

request.description: Register a new user account. Returns authentication token.
Login with email and password. Returns authentication token.

exec: console.log('✅ token saved to environment: ' + json.token.substring(0,20) + '...');
console.warn('⚠️  No token found in response. Check key path.');

request.description: Logout and revoke current authentication token.
Get authenticated user details.
Upload CV for AI analysis and skill extraction.
Retrieve all skills associated with the authenticated user.
Remove a specific skill from user profile.
Browse all jobs with pagination and optional search/filtering.
Get detailed information about a specific job including required skills.
Trigger job scraping from Wuzzuf. Set use_samples=true for testing without actual scraping.
Check if job title exists in database. If not found, triggers on-demand background scraping and returns 202 with status polling URL.

variable.description: Scraping Job ID from previous request

request.description: Poll the status of an on-demand scraping job. Returns pending/processing/completed/failed status.
Get recommended jobs based on user's extracted skills.
Analyze skill gap between user and a specific job. Returns match percentage, matched skills, missing skills, and recommendations.
Analyze multiple jobs at once. Returns ranked list by match percentage, common missing skills, and best match.
Get personalized skill recommendations based on job market demand. Skills prioritized as Critical, Important, or Nice-to-Have.
Get overall market statistics including total jobs, roles, average skills per job, and top 5 most in-demand skills.
Get detailed statistics for a specific job role including top skills, average experience, common locations, and salary range.

query.description: Filter by skill type: technical or soft

request.description: Get trending skills across all job roles, sorted by demand. Can filter by skill type.
Get comprehensive skill demand analysis for a specific role, including essential/important/nice-to-have categorization.
Check AI Engine health status.
Get all 84 predefined skills (66 technical + 18 soft).

formdata.description: Use NLP extraction (slower but more accurate)

request.description: Analyze CV and extract skills using AI.
Extract raw text from PDF without skill analysis.
Directly scrape jobs from AI Engine (usually called via Laravel).
Check job scraper service status.
Lightweight probe for a single scraping source.
Advanced CV parsing endpoint. Extracts job title, experience, and skills.
List all configured scraping sources.
Create a new scraping source configuration.
Get details of a specific scraping source.
Update an existing scraping source.
Delete a scraping source.
Toggle active/inactive status of a source.
Run an automated diagnostic test on all active scraping sources.
List target roles.
Create a required job target role.
Toggle target role active status.
Delete target role.
Run full scraping job manually.
Get all user applications for the job tracker.
Get details of a single tracked application.
Create or track a job application.
Update an application's status or notes.
Delete a tracked application.
Check Laravel API health status.

item.name: ⚙️ Phase 6: AI Gateway (Microservices)

formdata.description: Upload a PDF, DOCX, PNG, or JPG CV file

request.description: Upload a CV file to the AI Gateway. Returns skills (BERT NER), domain classification (BART-MNLI), domain_confidence, contact_info (email/phone/linkedin/github/location), and extraction_method.

formdata.description: Full URL of a job listing or job board API

request.description: Scrape a job listing URL using the full 5-phase ai-job-miner pipeline. Returns up to 5 parsed job dicts (title, job_type, work_model, location, salary, skills, match_score).

body.raw: {"cv_text":"Ahmed Khames — Senior Python Developer with 5 years experience in Django, FastAPI, Docker, PostgreSQL, Redis.","cv_skills":["python","django","fastapi","docker","postgresql","redis"],"job_description":"We need a Senior Backend Engineer. Expertise in Python, FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, Redis required.","job_skills":["python","fastapi","docker","kubernetes","postgresql","redis","django"]}

request.description: Compute weighted hybrid match: Final = (Semantic x 60%) + (TF-IDF x 40%). Returns hybrid_match_score, semantic_score, tfidf_score, missing_skills.

item.description: Endpoints exposed by ai-hybrid-orchestrator/main_api.py (FastAPI, port 8000). Run: uvicorn ai-hybrid-orchestrator.main_api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001 --reload. Swagger: http://127.0.0.1:8001/docs

variable.description: Laravel Backend API base URL (php artisan serve)
Legacy AI Engine (ai-engine venv, uvicorn port 8001)
AI Hybrid Orchestrator Gateway (port 8000). Swagger: http://127.0.0.1:8001/docs
Sanctum Bearer token — auto-filled by Login Tests script
